Our Heritage

The Art of Marble Mastery

At Zubia Industries, we are master craftsmen from Makrana, Rajasthan — the very heart of India's marble legacy. The same marble as the Taj Mahal.

From grand hotel fountains to sacred home mandirs, each creation is hand-carved with devotion, precision, and an unwavering pursuit of perfection. Factory direct.

100% Handcrafted
Every piece made by master artisans
Makrana Marble
Finest grade — same as Taj Mahal
Custom Designs
Your vision crafted to perfection
Pan India Delivery
Safe, insured, on-time delivery
